2605.30232.title: How's it going? Reinforcement learning in language models recruits a functional welfare axis
2605.30232.paper_summary: How does reinforcement learning shape a language model's internal representations? We present evidence that RL recruits a pre-existing representation of functional welfare: an estimate of how well or badly the system is doing, relative to its goals. We train several language models in a novel, semantically neutral maze environment. We then extract concept vectors for rewarded and punished trajectories, and evaluate those vectors in settings unrelated to the maze environment. The punishment vector behaves like a representation of negative welfare: it promotes failure and impossibility tokens, it aligns with negative emotion concepts, it negatively tracks goal-achievement, and steering with it induces negative self-reports, pathological backtracking, refusal, and uncertainty. The positive reward vector behaves as the mirror image, and the two are nearly antiparallel. These effects are robust when controlling for tile-to-reward mapping, scale, instruct tuning, RL training algorithm, model family, and LoRA versus full-finetuning, and largely persist when we replace RL with supervised fine-tuning. Importantly, the vectors are effective in models before they have undergone maze training. Combined with observations that the effects also appear in pretrain-only models, we therefore argue that this functional welfare axis pre-exists post-training: it is recruited, rather than created, by post-training. While we make no claims about any experience of welfare, the axis offers a demonstration that minimal reward signals can broadly affect model behavior by recruiting pre-existing welfare-like representations, with implications for interpretability, post-training dynamics, and alignment.
2605.30232.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習如何塑造語言模型的內部表徵？我們提供證據表明，強化學習招募了一種先前存在的功能福利表徵：這是一種對系統相對於其目標運行良好或不良的估計。我們在一個新穎的語義中立迷宮環境中訓練了幾個語言模型。然後，我們提取了獲獎和受罰軌跡的概念向量，並在與迷宮環境無關的設置中評估這些向量。懲罰向量的行為像是負福利的表徵：它促進失敗和不可能的標記，與負面情緒概念對齊，並且在目標達成上呈現負相關，使用它進行引導會引發負面自我報告、病態回溯、拒絕和不確定性。正獎勵向量的行為則如同其鏡像，兩者幾乎是反平行的。當控制瓷磚到獎勵映射、規模、指令調整、強化學習訓練算法、模型家族以及LoRA與完全微調時，這些效果是穩健的，並且在我們用監督微調替代強化學習時大部分仍然持續。重要的是，這些向量在模型尚未經過迷宮訓練之前就是有效的。結合觀察到的效果也出現在僅預訓練模型中，我們因此主張這一功能福利軸在訓練後就已經存在：它是被招募的，而不是由訓練後創造的。雖然我們不對任何福利的經驗做出聲明，但這一軸提供了一個示範，表明最小的獎勵信號可以廣泛影響模型行為，通過招募先前存在的類福利表徵，對可解釋性、訓練後動態和對齊具有影響。
2605.30232.author: Andy Q Han et.al.
2605.30232.authors: Andy Q Han, David J. Chalmers, Pavel Izmailov
